## How it was tested

## Checklist

- [ ] `go test ./...` passes locally
- [ ] `go vet ./...` is clean and the code is `gofmt`-formatted
- [ ] New behavior has tests (TDD where practical)
- [ ] The change is surgical — it touches only what the task requires
- [ ] Docs/help text updated if user-facing behavior changed
